name: Oriental Chicken #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Gradually stir in the vinegar and soy sauce.
3. Stir in the pineapple, green pepper, and onion; set aside.
4. Heat oil in a wok.
5. Add the chicken and stir fry until tender and white.
6. Add the pineapple and vegetable mixture; stir until well mixed.
7. Cover and simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
